top_signals.title: Global Stocks Hit One-Month Low, Oil Gains on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global equities fell to a more than one-month low as a technology-led selloff deepened and the war in Iran showed little signs of ending. Oil rose.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Climbs as Fresh US Strikes on Iran Threaten Fragile Truce
top_signals.summary: Oil rose after a second day of US military strikes on Iran, with the Islamic Republic announcing a halt to all vessels through the Strait of Hormuz in response, putting further strain on a fragile ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Bond Selloff Resumes as Rate Hike Fails to Stem Rout
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s bond selloff resumed Thursday as a surprise interest-rate hike earlier in the week failed to ease investor concerns over the broader economic pressures driving the market rout.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Germany welcome in GCAP, but new Leonardo boss warns about timing
top_signals.summary: CEO Lorenzo Mariani said that the advantages of a new partner were extra cash and know-how.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The fighting words fueling support for Japan’s World Cup team
top_signals.summary: Learn how Japanese expresses support, perseverance and encouragement through World Cup vocabulary and everyday phrases.
